form.formComment: Has finished fifth at the last two runs, both at Healesville, the latest when beaten 5.5 lengths behind Find The Sun over 300m. Not doing enough to be considered.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at the last two runs, both at Healesville, the latest when beaten 5.5 lengths behind Find The Sun over 300m. Not doing enough to be considered.

form.formComment: Was a Grade 4/5 winner (30.01) two back then found trouble and failed to finish at Sandown before a three months spell. Rates on top in this line up and given another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a Grade 4/5 winner (30.01) two back then found trouble and failed to finish at Sandown before a three months spell. Rates on top in this line up and given another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Faltered turning into back straight and tailed off.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (22.89) at big odds over 400m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (22.89) at big odds over 400m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when fifth (24.91) at Sale. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when fifth (24.91) at Sale. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.

form.formComment: Closed last campaign finishing sixth at this track over 400m three months ago. Drawn wide but can sneak into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Closed last campaign finishing sixth at this track over 400m three months ago. Drawn wide but can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by 1.75 lengths in a Free For All last start at Sale, recording a decent 24.49 over the 435m journey. In form and rates on top again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by 1.75 lengths in a Free For All last start at Sale, recording a decent 24.49 over the 435m journey. In form and rates on top again.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a slick early split and went straight to the front, giving a huge sight but headed late when a one length second (22.73) at this track. This appears within her reach.
